corporate.description: We develop smart applications to organize, manage, and simplify everyday life for people and businesses.

products.title: Our Products
products.subtitle: Solutions built to solve real problems
products.coming_soon_desc: New products are being developed. Stay tuned for the latest news.

tracka.name: Tracka
tracka.desc: Smart personal and business inventory management. Catalog, organize, and locate your belongings with AI.

hero.subtitle: Organize everything that matters. Catalog, locate, and manage your belongings with artificial intelligence.

search.title: Smart Search
search.desc: Find any item instantly with advanced filters.

moving.title: Moving Management
moving.desc: Plan moves with visual selection and status control.

multi_device.title: Multi-device
multi_device.desc: Access from any device. PWA with offline support.

security.title: Total Security
security.desc: Encrypted data in compliance with LGPD.

tech.title: Modern Stack
tech.desc: Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript, Turso, Vercel Edge.

user_focus.title: User Focus
user_focus.desc: Intuitive interface inspired by Netflix with premium design.

innovation.title: AI Powered
innovation.desc: Google Cloud Vision for automatic item recognition.

pricing.title: Plans & Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the ideal plan for your needs.
pricing.trial: ✨ 15-day free trial with all features on sign up!

free.name: Free
free.desc: For personal use and small organizations.
free.features: 50 Items,50 Vision AI 🤖,1 House,5 Rooms/house,5 Furniture/room,1 Photos/item,0 Collaborators/house

plus.name: Plus
plus.desc: For those who need more space and resources.
plus.features: 200 Items,600 Vision AI 🤖,3 Houses,15 Rooms/house,15 Furniture/room,3 Photos/item,2 Collaborators/house,Usage history,Ranking (most used),Data export,Consolidation/Moving

pro.name: Pro
pro.desc: For those who need the most out of Tracka.
pro.features: 2000 Items,10000 Vision AI 🤖,10 Houses,50 Rooms/house,50 Furniture/room,5 Photos/item,10 Collaborators/house,Usage history,Ranking (most used),Import (Excel),Data export,Consolidation/Moving

items.question: Is Tracka free?
items.answer: Yes! The Free plan is free forever.

items.question: Is my data safe?
items.answer: Yes, we use encryption and follow LGPD.

items.question: Does it work on mobile?
items.answer: Yes! Tracka is a PWA that works on any device.

cta.title: Ready to organize your life?
cta.subtitle: Start for free and discover how Tracka can simplify your day.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Configure texts, sections, integrations, and APIs for the corporate site.

landing.title: Landing Page
landing.subtitle: Configure texts, sections, testimonials, and links for the Tracka public page.
landing.name: Name
landing.question: Question

plans.title: Plans & Pricing
plans.subtitle: Subscription plan settings.
plans.info: Plans and pricing are configured directly on the app settings page.
plans.infoDetail: Only the {role} has access to this configuration. Changes made there are automatically reflected on both the app and the landing page.

visibility.title: Plan Visibility
visibility.subtitle: Control which plans and features are shown on the landing page
visibility.emptyDescription: Check if Tracka is accessible and reload the page.
visibility.info: This configuration **does not change plans in Tracka** — it only controls what is displayed on the landing page for marketing purposes. Data comes from the actual Tracka configuration.

apiKeys.title: Integrations / API Keys
apiKeys.subtitle: Configure API keys for external services.
apiKeys.googlePlacesHint: Optional. Used as fallback for international address lookup when Nominatim (OpenStreetMap) returns no results.

freshdesk.title: Freshdesk — Customer Support
freshdesk.subtitle: Configure Freshworks support modules.
freshdesk.domainHint: Your Freshworks domain (obtained from the Freshdesk admin panel)
freshdesk.widgetDesc: Floating bubble for contact and FAQ
freshdesk.widgetIdHint: Paste the numeric ID or deployment script — the ID will be extracted automatically
freshdesk.ticketsDesc: Dedicated page for creating and tracking tickets
freshdesk.syncDesc: Publishes internal Help topics as articles in the Freshdesk KB. Public topics are visible to all. Admin topics are restricted to agents.
freshdesk.chatDesc: Real-time chat with the support team
freshdesk.chatTokenHint: Paste the UUID token or deployment script — the token will be extracted automatically

history.title: Change History
history.filter: Filter by section, field, or user...
history.noEntries: No changes recorded. History will appear after the first update.
